arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the MemoryDB subnet group.

description.description: A brief description of the MemoryDB subnet group.

id.description: The unique identifier of the MemoryDB subnet group.

subnet_ids.description: A set of subnet IDs associated with the MemoryDB subnet group.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the MemoryDB subnet group.

vpc_id.description: The ID of the VPC that the MemoryDB subnet group is in.
